scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend && npm run clean:next-cache
scripts.lint: npm --prefix backend run lint && npm --prefix frontend run lint
scripts.clean:project: npm run clean:next && npm run docker:prune
scripts.docker:prune: npm run docker:prune:images && npm run docker:prune:build-cache
scripts.docker:infra: docker compose up -d --build --remove-orphans db tailscale db-tailscale-proxy libreoffice symmetricds && npm run docker:prune:images
scripts.docker:backend: docker compose build backend && docker compose up -d --no-deps backend && npm run docker:prune:images
scripts.docker:up: npm run build:frontend:docker && docker compose up -d --build --remove-orphans && npm run docker:prune:images
scripts.docker:renderer: docker compose -f docker-compose.libreoffice.yml up -d --build --remove-orphans && npm run docker:prune:images
